hooks.command: bash -c '[ -f /tmp/auto-build.disabled ] && exit 0; echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "\.(kt|xml|gradle)" && cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && export JAVA_HOME="C:/Program Files/Java/jdk-21.0.10" && ./gradlew assembleDebug --console=plain -q 2>&1 | tail -2 && "C:/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" push app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk /data/local/tmp/app.apk 2>/dev/null && "C:/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb.exe" shell "pm install -r /data/local/tmp/app.apk" 2>/dev/null && echo ">>> Auto-install OK" || true'

bash -c 'PIDFILE=/tmp/watch-build.pid; if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ] && kill -0 $(cat "$PIDFILE") 2>/dev/null; then echo "watch-build: đang chạy (PID $(cat $PIDFILE))"; else cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && nohup bash scripts/watch-build.sh >/tmp/watch-build.log 2>&1 & echo $! > "$PIDFILE"; echo "watch-build: đã khởi động (PID $!), log: /tmp/watch-build.log"; fi'
